verdict.summary: Guide has several material errors on IUC categories, exemptions, late-payment penalties, payment methods and buyer liability; it should not be published without correction.

issues.current: Расчёт зависит от класса (A–E), объёма двигателя, выбросов CO2 и года.
issues.problem: Misleading: CO2 is not used for all categories A–E. For passenger cars, category A is generally pre-01.07.2007 and taxed mainly by displacement/fuel/year bands; category B is post-01.07.2007 and uses displacement + CO2 + registration-year/environmental coefficients. Categories C/D/E have different bases.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Для легковых: категория A — автомобили, зарегистрированные с 1981 до 30.06.2007, ставка в основном по объёму/топливу; категория B — с 01.07.2007, ставка по объёму двигателя, CO2 и коэффициентам года регистрации. Для грузовых, мотоциклов, лодок и самолётов правила другие.»

issues.problem: Portuguese IUC late-payment penalties are not a simple automatic 10–50% surcharge. Late payment can trigger compensatory/default interest, coima under RGIT and later cobrança coerciva; reduced coima rules depend on voluntary regularisation and timing. The 10/20/30% ladder used later in the guide is also not the legal rule.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Просрочка ведёт к juros de mora/compensatórios и возможной coima по RGIT; при длительной неуплате долг может перейти в execução fiscal/cobrança coerciva. Размер зависит от ситуации, а не от простой шкалы 10–50%.»
issues.source: RGIT; Lei Geral Tributária; Código do IUC

issues.problem: Wrong category definition. Category A is not «<1100 cc» and not «до 1981». It covers light passenger/mixed vehicles generally registered from 1981 until 30.06.2007. Vehicles before 1981 are generally outside the normal category A annual IUC table/exempt or treated differently depending on facts.
issues.suggestion: Change title to: «Категория A — легковые/смешанные автомобили, зарегистрированные с 1981 до 30.06.2007» and explain that rates vary by fuel and cylinder capacity, not only <1100 cc.
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 2 and art. 8

issues.problem: Misleading. Category A is not just vintage cars. It includes many ordinary passenger cars registered between 1981 and 30.06.2007, and IUC can be well above €25 depending on engine size and fuel.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Это в основном автомобили 1981–30.06.2007. Ставка зависит от топлива и объёма двигателя; для малолитражек может быть несколько десятков евро, для больших двигателей — существенно больше.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 8; annual IUC rate tables

issues.current: Категория B — лёгкие с бензиновым двигателем (1982+)
issues.problem: Wrong category definition. Category B is not limited to petrol cars and not «1982+». It is broadly for light passenger/mixed vehicles registered from 01.07.2007 onward, including diesel and other fuels; diesel vehicles may have additional IUC components.
issues.suggestion: Change to: «Категория B — легковые/смешанные автомобили, зарегистрированные с 01.07.2007» and add: «включает бензин, дизель и другие виды топлива; для дизеля возможна дополнительная надбавка».
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 2 and art. 9

issues.problem: Incomplete: category E covers motorcycles, mopeds, tricycles and quadricycles above the relevant taxable thresholds/registered since the applicable dates, not only generic motorcycles. Also rates depend on cylinder-capacity bands and age/registration period.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Категория E — мотоциклы, мопеды, трициклы и квадрициклы, когда они подпадают под IUC; ставка зависит от объёма и года регистрации.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 2 and art. 11

issues.problem: Oversimplified and likely wrong. IUC separates goods vehicles into categories C and D depending on weight and use, with rates based on gross weight, axles/suspension and other factors. «до 12 т» is not a safe definition.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Категории C/D — грузовые и связанные транспортные средства; ставка зависит от массы, числа осей, типа подвески и использования. Для коммерческих машин лучше проверять напрямую в Portal das Finanças/таблицах Código do IUC.»

issues.current: Освобождены от IUC (только Imposto sobre os Veículos, IVA при покупке + номинальная плата).
issues.problem: Confusing and partly wrong. Pure battery-electric vehicles are generally exempt from IUC and also from ISV; saying «только ISV» implies ISV is payable. Hybrids/plug-in hybrids are not automatically IUC-exempt merely because they are electrified.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Полностью электрические автомобили обычно освобождены от IUC и ISV; IVA при покупке сохраняется. Гибриды и plug-in hybrids не считаются автоматически освобождёнными — проверяйте конкретный тип и регистрацию.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 5; Código do ISV

issues.problem: Misleading payment method. Taxes generated with entidade/referência are normally paid by Multibanco/homebanking using the reference, MB WAY where available, CTT/Payshop or other AT-supported channels. A normal bank transfer to AT is not the standard way to pay IUC and may not allocate correctly.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «🏦 Homebanking/Multibanco: pagamento ao Estado по entidade + referência + montante» and avoid saying ordinary bank transfer.
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária — Portal das Finanças payment instructions

issues.problem: Incorrect penalty formula. IUC late penalties are not a statutory automatic 10% after 30 days.
issues.suggestion: Replace the whole staged list with: «После срока начисляются проценты и может быть открыто дело о налоговом правонарушении с coima; если долг не погашен, AT может передать его в cobrança coerciva/execução fiscal.»

issues.problem: Incorrect penalty formula. There is no simple automatic +20% IUC surcharge at 60 days.
issues.suggestion: Remove this item and use the RGIT/interest/cobrança coerciva explanation instead.

issues.problem: Incorrect penalty formula. There is no simple automatic +30% IUC surcharge at 90 days.
issues.suggestion: Remove this item and explain that the amount depends on interest, coima and procedural stage.

issues.current: ✅ План оплаты частями (parcelamento) — возможен для суммы > 102 €
issues.problem: The €102 threshold is not safely stated for IUC and may be outdated/misapplied. Instalment plans depend on whether the debt is already in cobrança coerciva/execução fiscal, the amount, guarantees and AT rules. A precise threshold needs an official source.
issues.suggestion: Write more cautiously: «Рассрочка может быть доступна через Portal das Finanças, особенно если долг уже в execução fiscal; условия зависят от суммы и статуса долга.»
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária — pagamento em prestações / execução fiscal rules

issues.current: Без него вы можете унаследовать долг.
issues.problem: Wrong and contradicts the earlier warning that IUC is a personal tax debt of the taxpayer. A buyer does not normally inherit the seller’s existing IUC debt merely by buying the car. The real risk is if ownership was not properly registered or if the taxable event occurs while the buyer is already the registered holder.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Попросите comprovativo и проверьте регистрацию, но старый долг по IUC обычно остаётся долгом того, кто был зарегистрированным владельцем/держателем на дату возникновения налога. Покупатель рискует, если сделка/регистрация оформлены неправильно или новый IUC уже наступил после перехода регистрации.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 3; AT practice on taxable person

issues.problem: Overbroad. Disability exemption has conditions: generally medical incapacity certificate, one vehicle, ownership/use rules, CO2 limits for category B vehicles and a monetary cap/excess may apply. It is not simply unlimited «full exemption» for any car.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Люди с инвалидностью ≥60% могут получить освобождение по одному автомобилю при соблюдении условий Código do IUC; для категории B действуют лимиты CO2, и освобождение ограничено установленным максимумом — превышение может оплачиваться.»

issues.problem: Needs caveat. The exemption is for vehicles moved exclusively by electric energy; not all electrified vehicles in category B/E qualify. Hybrids and plug-in hybrids should not be grouped with pure EVs.
issues.suggestion: Write: «⚡ Полностью электрические транспортные средства — освобождение от IUC; гибриды/PHEV проверяются отдельно и обычно не получают такое же освобождение автоматически.»

issues.current: 🚗 Первый год для ветеранов и многодетных — скидка
issues.problem: Misleading. Large-family IUC benefit is not merely a first-year discount; it is a specific reduction under conditions such as household composition, vehicle characteristics and CO2 limits. Former combatant/veteran benefits, where applicable, are also not accurately described as a generic first-year discount.
issues.suggestion: Split into separate bullets: «👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Семьи с 3+ dependentes могут иметь 50% redução do IUC по одному автомобилю при соблюдении лимитов CO2/условий.» and «🎖️ Former combatants may have specific IUC exemption/benefit under their own rules; check AT before relying on it.»
issues.source: Código do IUC, art. 5 and annual State Budget rules; Estatuto do Antigo Combatente

issues.problem: The upper bound is too low for many category B cars, especially high-CO2 large-engine diesels and post-2007 vehicles with environmental coefficients/diesel additions. The guide itself says «большой дизель — 300–700 €» in the TLDR, so the cost table contradicts it.
issues.suggestion: Change range to something like «200–700+» and add «точно смотрите в Portal das Finanças; CO2 and diesel supplements can move the amount sharply».
issues.source: Código do IUC rate tables; Portal das Finanças IUC simulator/payment

issues.problem: Likely wrong/fragile DRE path: Código do IUC was approved by Lei n.º 22-A/2007, not a Decreto-Lei. The consolidated DRE/Diário da República URL should point to the consolidated Lei entry or to the current diariodarepublica.pt page.
issues.suggestion: Use the current consolidated law page for «Lei n.º 22-A/2007 — Código do IUC» on Diário da República, e.g. the diariodarepublica.pt consolidated legislation entry for Lei/2007/34442375, and verify the exact URL.

missing_topics: Explicit distinction between category A and category B passenger cars: registration before/after 01.07.2007 and how CO2 applies
Diesel additional IUC component/surcharge for many diesel vehicles
Imported used cars: tax calculation may consider first EU/EEA registration because of EU-law compliance, while payment month normally follows Portuguese matrícula
One-vehicle and CO2/cap conditions for disability exemption
Large-family reduction conditions instead of calling it a first-year discount
Proper AT official source or direct Portal das Finanças path for IUC payment and payment channels
Clear warning that seller’s old IUC debt normally does not transfer to the buyer, but registration errors can create risk
